query:
SELECT
            COALESCE(s.tags, ARRAY[]::text[]) AS "tags!: Vec<String>",
            s.bpm AS "bpm?",
            s.key AS "music_key?"
        FROM samples s
        JOIN coleccion_samples cs ON cs.sample_id = s.id
        WHERE cs.coleccion_id = $1
          AND s.estado = 'activo'
          AND s.eliminado_en IS NULL
